strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.description: Replace type-based branching with interchangeable handler objects.
strategy.recommendation: Extract each branch into a handler class and resolve it through match, a registry, or the container.

action.title: Action / Use Case
action.description: Move orchestration out of the controller into a single-purpose action class.
action.recommendation: Create an invokable action or use-case class and keep the controller thin.

repository.title: Repository
repository.description: Isolate persistence queries behind a dedicated repository layer.
repository.recommendation: Move query builder and Eloquent access into a repository consumed by actions or services.

value_object.title: Value Object / DTO
value_object.description: Replace loosely typed parameter groups with a dedicated value object.
value_object.recommendation: Introduce a readonly DTO or value object when several primitives travel together.

guard_clauses.title: Guard Clauses
guard_clauses.description: Flatten nested conditionals with early returns and preconditions.
guard_clauses.recommendation: Invert conditions and return early before the main happy-path logic.

extract_method.title: Extract Method
extract_method.description: Split a long method into smaller private methods with clear names.
extract_method.recommendation: Extract cohesive blocks into private methods or dedicated classes.

dependency_injection.title: Constructor Dependency Injection
dependency_injection.description: Replace service location and manual instantiation with injected dependencies.
dependency_injection.recommendation: Inject dependencies through the constructor and let Laravel resolve them from the container.

form_request.title: Form Request
form_request.description: Move inline validation into a dedicated Form Request class.
form_request.recommendation: Create a Form Request with rules() and authorize() instead of validating inside the controller.

policy.title: Authorization Policy
policy.description: Move authorization checks into a dedicated policy or gate.
policy.recommendation: Extract authorization into a Policy class and call $this->authorize() before mutating models.

pipeline.title: Pipeline
pipeline.description: Chain multi-step workflows through Laravel's pipeline instead of inline orchestration.
pipeline.recommendation: Extract sequential steps into pipe classes and run them with Pipeline::send()->through().

enum.title: Backed Enum
enum.description: Replace repeated string status comparisons with a typed enum.
enum.recommendation: Introduce a backed enum for status/state values and compare against enum cases.

api_resource.title: API Resource
api_resource.description: Wrap Eloquent results in API resources before returning JSON.
api_resource.recommendation: Return UserResource or Resource::collection() instead of raw models from controller actions.
